folio.label: 198r
folio.l: Dide his message , and whan that he it tolde
Vrban for ioye , his handes gan vp holde
¢ The teeres from his eyen , leet he falle

note.notetxt: 190Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Almygúty lord , o Ihu~ Crist quod he
Sowere of chast counseil , hierde of vs alle
The fruyt of thilke seed , of Chastitee
That æè hast sowe in Cecile , take to the
Lo lyke a bisy bee , witú oute gyle
The seruytú ay , thyn owen thral Cecile
¢ For thilke spouse , that she tok but now

note.notetxt: 197Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Ful lyke a fiers leou~ , she senditú heere
As meke , as euere was any lamb to ©ow
And w æ word , a noon there gan appere
An olde man , clad in white clothes clere
That hadde a book , w &lbar;re of gold in honde
And gan , biforn valerian , to stonde
¢ Valerian as ded , fel doun for drede

note.notetxt: 204 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: Whan he hi~ say , & he vp hente hi~ tho
And oon his book , rigút thus he gan to rede
O lord , of o feitú , o god , witú oute moo
O cristendom , and fader of alle also
A bouen alle , & ouä alle , euery where
Theise wordes , alle w gold , I wretyn were
¢ Whan this was red , than seide this olde man

note.notetxt: 211Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Leeuest æè this thyng or no , sey ©a or nay
I leue alle thyng , quod valerian
For sother thyng than this , I dar wel say
Vnder the heuene , no wygút thynke may
Tho vanysshed this olde man , he nyste where
And Pope vrban , hi~ cristened rigút there
¢ Valerian gotú hoom , and fynt Cicilie

note.notetxt: 218 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: W Inne his Chaumbre , w an Aungel stond
This Aungel hadde of Roses , and of lilie
Corounes two , the whicú he bar in honde
And first to Cecile , as I vnderstonde
He ©af that oon , and after gan he take
That other , to valerian hire make
¢ Witú body clene , and w vnwe~med thougút

note.notetxt: 225Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Kepetú ay wel , theise corones quod he
Fro Paradys to ©ow , haue I hem brougút
Ne neuere moo , ne shuln they roten be
Ne lese here swote sauour , trustetú me
